original_snippet_context: A letter criticizing the government of Rodrigues Alves, and discussing their focus on material improvements instead of economic development. The letter mentions the creation of a "Caixa de Conversão" to address exchange rate issues, in contrast to those benefiting from the high exchange rate.
relevant_quote: Foi dahi que se originou a idéa da fixação do cambio por meio de uma Caixa de Conversão, idéa tão desejada pelos productores quanto combatida por aquelles que estão ganhando com a alta.
justification: This quote clearly frames the "Caixa de Conversão" as a tool desired by producers to fix the exchange rate, contrasting them with those benefiting from the high exchange rate (which is an expansionist perspective, aiming at relief for the productive sectors).
